title: Expression of novel nitrate reductase genes in the harmful alga, Chattonella subsalsa
author: Wang, Yanfei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Gene expression of NR2 and NR3 in harmful algal Chattonella subsalsa. Gene expression was evaluated using quantitative real-time PCR (qPCR), normalized to the expression of an actin gene.
steps_raw: Gene expression of NR2 and NR3 in harmful algal Chattonella subsalsa. Gene expression was evaluated using quantitative real-time PCR (qPCR), normalized to the expression of an actin gene.
